(https://www.eas.slu.edu/eqc/eqccps.html)

The newest release is on Oct-26-2023 and support Linux and OSX.

It is very popular in the seismology community.

The code combines C and Fortran codes, I want to compile this with lfortran.

I tried to rewrite the makefile but met some errors in the compiling step.


To compile this package please follow  below step

LINUX6440I  is my modification from the raw LINUX6440(gcc/gfortran) option. 


```
./Setup LINUX6440I

./C

```
